hero.name: Sohrab Fadai
hero.pitch: I help companies get seen. PR, websites, and AI — from Stockholm.

pr.title: PR & Communications
pr.description: Strategic PR, media relations, opinion pieces, and crisis comms. Via Heartspace.

web.title: Web Development
web.description: Fast, modern websites with CMS. No templates, no WordPress.

ai.description: Helping companies integrate AI into their workflows. Not theory — implementation.

medis.title: Medis Kök & Bar
medis.description: Replaced a slow WordPress site with a modern, mobile-first experience. TheFork booking built in, 95+ PageSpeed.

parklife.description: Communications strategy and media relations for a Nordic outdoor company.

techarena.title: Techarena 2026
techarena.description: 100+ segmented email campaigns, Webflow site, and on-site communications for Sweden's largest tech conference.

lkr.title: LKR / SNF

about.title: About
about.text: Raised in Dalarna. Born in Tehran. Based in Stockholm. Rhetoric degree from Uppsala, five years as regional director at Företagarna, PR consultant at Westander, three published books. Founded the PR agency Heartspace in 2021. I get important messages through the noise.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Want to work together? Reach out.
